nasb.text: And he called for lights and rushed in, and trembling with fear he fell down before Paul and Silas,

esv.text: And the jailer called for lights and rushed in, and trembling with fear he fell down before Paul and Silas.

cnv.text: 獄吏叫人拿了燈來，就衝進去，戰戰兢兢地俯伏在保羅和西拉面前，

ccb.text: 狱卒叫人拿灯过来，冲进内牢，战战兢兢地俯伏在保罗和西拉面前。

csbs.text: 狱卒叫人拿了灯来，就冲进去，战战兢兢地俯伏在保罗和赛拉斯面前，
